items.situation: campus bookstore moving to a new building
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Starting next Monday, the campus bookstore will relocate from its current spot in Baldwin Hall to the newly renovated space on the ground floor of Harmon Center. The move means the store will be closed this Thursday and Friday while staff pack and transport inventory. We'll reopen at 9 a.m. on Monday with extended hours through the end of the month. Please note that all textbook rental returns due this week must be dropped off at the temporary return bin outside Baldwin Hall's main entrance. We're excited to welcome you to the new, larger location soon.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: Announce the bookstore's move to Harmon Center
options.B: Explain the store's new extended hours

questions.explanation: 公告核心是宣布校园书店将搬迁至Harmon Center的新址，A正确。B错误：延长营业时间只是搬迁后的一个细节，不是公告的整体目的，属于以偏概全。C错误：公告没有提到教材租赁政策的变化，属于错误目的。D错误：书店是要搬迁而非永久关闭，与事实相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the temporary return bin outside Baldwin Hall?

options.A: It is monitored by campus security cameras
options.B: It is positioned near Baldwin Hall's entrance
options.C: It will be removed after reopening
options.D: It will replace the bookstore permanently

questions.explanation: 公告说退还处只是"temporary return bin"（临时退还箱），暗示书店周一重新开业后该临时设施就会被撤走，C正确。A错误：公告完全没有提到安保摄像头，属于无关推理。B错误：这只是复述原文中"outside Baldwin Hall's main entrance"的位置信息，不是推理。D错误：把临时退还箱说成会永久取代书店，超出了合理推断范围。

items.situation: resume and cover letter review clinic hosted by the career center
items.announcement: Good morning, students. The Career Center is hosting a free resume and cover letter review clinic this Wednesday from 1 to 4 p.m. in the Advising Suite on the second floor of Wilkins Hall. Career advisors will read your documents line by line and offer specific suggestions for improvement. You don't need an appointment; we're welcoming walk-ins throughout the afternoon. Please bring a printed copy of your current resume, along with any job posting you're applying to, so advisors can tailor their feedback. Space fills up quickly, so we recommend arriving early if you'd like a shorter wait.

options.A: Explain how to write cover letters
options.B: Offer free resume feedback to students
options.C: Announce new career center staff members

questions.explanation: 公告的核心是提供免费的简历和求职信反馈服务，B正确。A错误：求职信写作只是活动内容的一部分，不能代表整体目的，属于以偏概全。C错误：公告没有提到任何新员工的信息，属于错误目的。D错误：公告明确说不需要预约（You don't need an appointment），要求学生必须预约与原意相反。

questions.stem: What are students advised to bring to the clinic?

options.B: A list of three professional references
options.D: A printed copy of their resume

questions.explanation: 原文说"Please bring a printed copy of your current resume"，所以学生需要自带打印好的简历，D正确。A错误：公告明确说不需要预约确认，属于与事实相反的错误细节。B错误：公告没有提到需要提供推荐人名单，属于合理但未提及。C错误：去二楼咨询室的路线不是活动要求携带的物品，属于错置细节。

items.situation: computer lab relocating to a different floor
items.announcement: The computer lab currently on the third floor of Kessler Library will move to the first floor starting next Monday. Workers will spend this weekend transferring machines and rewiring network connections, so the lab won't be open Saturday or Sunday. Once reopened, the new space will offer twice as many workstations and a dedicated printing station near the entrance. Students needing computer access this weekend should use the smaller lab in the engineering building instead. We'll post updated hours on the library's website once the move is complete. Thank you for your patience as we work to improve this space.

questions.stem: What is the primary purpose of this announcement?

options.B: Recruit student workers for the library
options.D: Announce the permanent closing of the lab

questions.explanation: 公告的核心是宣布电脑实验室将从三楼搬到一楼，C正确。A错误：打印站只是新空间的一个细节，不能代表整体目的，属于以偏概全。B错误：公告没有提到招聘学生工作人员，属于错误目的。D错误：实验室是搬迁而非永久关闭，与事实相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the new lab space?

options.A: It will accommodate more students than before
options.B: It includes a printing station by the entrance
options.C: It will permanently replace the engineering lab
options.D: It is funded by a technology grant

questions.explanation: 公告说新空间的工作站数量将是原来的两倍，由此可推断新实验室能容纳比以前更多的学生，A正确。B错误：这只是复述原文中"a dedicated printing station near the entrance"，不是推理。C错误：把搬迁说成会永久取代工程学院的实验室，超出了合理推断范围。D错误：公告完全没有提到任何科技资助，属于无关推理。

items.situation: spring academic symposium with limited seats and prerequisites
items.announcement: Due to overwhelming interest in last year's spring symposium, this year's event will require advance registration and is limited to sixty attendees. The Department of Psychology's Spring Research Symposium takes place next Thursday from 3 to 6 p.m. in the Fenwick Auditorium. Because several sessions cover advanced statistical methods, attendees are required to have completed at least one research methods course before registering. Interested students should submit the registration form on the department website by this Monday; spots will be assigned on a first-come, first-served basis. Faculty will follow up with confirmed attendees to share the final session schedule. We're looking forward to a lively exchange of ideas.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: Describe statistical methods taught in class
options.B: Recruit new faculty for the department
options.C: Invite all students without any restrictions
options.D: Announce registration requirements for a symposium

questions.explanation: 公告的核心是说明参加研讨会需要提前注册并满足先修课程等要求，D正确。A错误：统计方法只是研讨会部分环节的内容，不能代表整体目的，属于以偏概全。B错误：公告没有提到招聘新教师，属于错误目的。C错误：公告明确限制人数并要求先修课程，说成对所有学生开放且无限制与原意相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who haven't taken a research methods course?

options.A: They will automatically fail their course
options.B: They may struggle to follow sessions
options.C: They must complete that course first
options.D: They can request a tuition refund

questions.explanation: 公告说部分环节涉及高级统计方法，且要求参与者已完成一门研究方法课程，由此可推断没有修过该课程的学生可能难以跟上部分环节，B正确。A错误：公告没有说未修课的学生会自动挂科，属于过度推理。C错误：这只是复述原文中"required to have completed...course"的要求，不是推理。D错误：公告完全没有提到学费退款，属于无关推理。

items.situation: housing office info session on off-campus lease options
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the Off-Campus Housing Office will hold an information session on signing off-campus leases this Tuesday at 5 p.m. in Room 118 of the Student Center. An advisor will walk through what to check in a lease, including deposit rules and subletting policies, before students sign anything. The session is especially useful for sophomores moving off campus for the first time next fall. Attendees are encouraged to bring a copy of any lease they're currently considering so the advisor can review it directly. Light refreshments will be served, and no registration is required to attend.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: Inform students about a lease session

questions.explanation: 公告的核心是提醒学生校外住房信息说明会的时间地点，A正确。B错误：转租政策只是说明会内容的一部分，不能代表整体目的，属于以偏概全。C错误：公告没有宣布任何新的校外住房选择，属于错误目的。D错误：公告说不需要报名（no registration is required），要求所有学生必须参加与原意相反。

questions.stem: What are students advised to bring to the session?
questions.explanation: 原文说"bring a copy of any lease they're currently considering"，所以参加者应携带正在考虑的租约副本，C正确。A错误：公告没有提到需要携带已签署的转租协议，属于错误细节。B错误：公告没有提到需要携带室友名单，属于合理但未提及。D错误：押金支付不是要求携带的物品，属于错置细节。
